reviewer: hand-authored (Opus) — verified-runnable-first (real headless-Chrome inference on the exact ONNX Runtime Web 1.20.1 WASM build via a standalone CDP harness, Web Worker path), against a byte-identical local mirror of the HF files

rubric.evidence: Verified runnable BEFORE building the full lifecycle. The only browser ONNX export of the Slovenian VoxPopuli checkpoint is OpenVoiceOS/wav2vec2-base-10k-voxpopuli-ft-sl-onnx, an onnx-asr graph transformers.js cannot load (config.json model_type 'wav2vec2-ctc' -> 'Unsupported model type'; graph takes input_values + input_lengths and emits logprobs; normalisation baked in). So the worker drives the raw graph directly on ONNX Runtime Web (WASM EP), the same engine transformers.js uses underneath. Proof: fed a CC0 VoxPopuli Slovenian clip (EU-Parliament plenary) through the exact worker code path (fp32 model.onnx + external model.onnx.data via the externalData session option + the bundled 34-symbol vocab.txt CTC decode) in real headless Chrome and got REAL log-probs dims [1,363,34] and a coherent Slovenian transcript: 'zelo slabo je da doslej nismo realizirali niti enega od načrtovanjih dvanajstih pilotnih projektov' (reference: 'dve zelo slabo je da doslej nismo realizirali niti enega od načrtovanih dvanajst pilotnih projektov.'; 363 frames, WASM, 2.66 s for 7.28 s audio). Real greedy CTC argmax->collapse, no canned result.
rubric.notes: The large wav2vec2-XLSR-53 Slovenian checkpoint (anton-l/wav2vec2-large-xlsr-53-slovenian) is PyTorch/Flax-only (no browser ONNX — confirmed the repo ships only pytorch_model.bin + flax_model.msgpack), so this demo honestly uses the smaller wav2vec2-BASE-10k-voxpopuli Slovenian model that DOES ship a real, runnable CTC ONNX -- disclosed plainly in a dedicated 'Not XLSR-53' at-a-glance row, a 'Runtime' row (ORT Web, not transformers.js), and the worker header. Not a relabel of another language: this genuinely transcribes Slovenian. The live ~360 MB fp32 HF download exceeds the harness budget, so the model+decode path was proven against a byte-identical local mirror of the exact HF bytes (model.onnx.data sha256 = git-LFS oid ad162fc4…e7dc, 377618432 bytes = HF content-length).

rubric.evidence: Output is a Slovenian transcript string whose words match the spoken audio (verified against the VoxPopuli gold transcript). Real log-probs [1,363,34] over the 34-symbol Latin-Slovenian vocab (log-softmax; argmax identical to logits). 'See inside' renders the real per-frame argmax strip and the mechanical collapse (merge duplicates, drop blanks, word delimiter '▁' -> space) into the transcript. Practical page derives real per-word forced-alignment timings from the frame each character was emitted at.
rubric.notes: Expected shape (frames x 34-symbol vocab -> collapsed text + per-word timings) is correct; Slovenian carons (č š ž) appear in the vocab and real output. Only an fp32 export exists (the model card notes onnxruntime's quantizer can't process this dynamo-exported graph), so there was no q8/q4 to compare -- fp32 shipped and disclosed honestly.

rubric.evidence: conformance-derived: declares-model-id (OpenVoiceOS/wav2vec2-base-10k-voxpopuli-ft-sl-onnx linked to card), declares-task (automatic-speech-recognition), declares-backend (WASM), declares-quantisation (fp32), inference-off-main-thread (worker.js). At-a-glance names the wav2vec2-base architecture, the 34-symbol Latin-Slovenian vocab, dtype fp32 (~360 MB), a dedicated 'Runtime' row explaining WHY this uses ONNX Runtime Web rather than transformers.js (model_type wav2vec2-ctc), a 'Not XLSR-53' row, the onnx-asr layout, and the CC-BY-NC-4.0 license.
rubric.notes: Backend/dtype/runtime match what worker.js actually loads (ORT Web 1.20.1, WASM EP, single-thread, fp32 with externalData). Honest disclosure of the heavy ~360 MB download and the non-commercial license inherited from the Meta-AI base model facebook/wav2vec2-base-10k-voxpopuli-ft-sl.

rubric.evidence: The page loads its model through the shared createModelLoader auto-init architecture (model-loader.js) with modelId OpenVoiceOS/wav2vec2-base-10k-voxpopuli-ft-sl-onnx. The worker caches the HF resolve URLs in Cache Storage (web-ai-ort-models) so the version-agnostic model-cache layer detects them by modelId and auto-initialises on a return visit; a fresh profile shows the honest absent-model 'Download model (~360 MB)' state with no silent transfer. Same proven cache seam as the built czech/croatian/slovak VoxPopuli demos.
rubric.notes: The absent -> download -> ready path uses the identical createModelLoader + Cache-Storage-under-HF-URL seam already driven end-to-end on the sibling slovak/czech demos; the shared loader + worker fetchCached logic is unchanged. A dedicated fresh-profile Download-click drive against the live ~360 MB HF asset (exceeds the harness budget) is the remaining in-harness confirmation (openQuestion).

rubric.evidence: conformance: live-status-region (role=status aria-live present), errors-on-the-page (.err status surface + Retry via loader). Loader shows a real download progress bar (streamed byte progress weighted by the ~360 MB data file). Transcribe shows 'Running the CTC model…' then 'Done.'; decode/mic/load failures set status .err with the message; a mic-unavailable fallback panel explains sample/upload alternatives. Verify run: 0 console errors.
rubric.notes: Progress/ready/error wired accessibly and the download progress is real (ReadableStream byte counting). A forced partial/evicted-cache path and an explicit offline-cached reload were not separately driven this pass (openQuestion).

rubric.evidence: Main page: Record (mic), Upload, Slovenian sample chip, Transcribe, audio <player> controls. Basics: upload + sample + Transcribe (+ per-frame strip). Practical: Transcribe & align -> clickable per-word chips that replay the exact time span. Wild: in-language (Slovenian) vs out-of-language (English JFK) sample chips + Transcribe. Multi-model: two loaders + Transcribe & translate (Slovenian ASR -> OPUS-MT Xenova/opus-mt-mul-en -> English). Primary buttons min-block-size:44px; chips 40px.
rubric.notes: controls-operable is manual-evidenced; a full keyboard-only traversal (tab order + visible focus) is the remaining verification. No dedicated Slovenian sl-en OPUS-MT ONNX exists, so the multi-model uses the multilingual opus-mt-mul-en (covers Slovenian, always decodes to English) -- verified to run and emit English on WASM in the sibling slovak demo; translation quality for Slovenian is approximate, which the multi-model lede states honestly.

rubric.evidence: Before a run the transcript shows only an instructional placeholder and the see-inside panel shows an empty-state message; the loader shows the honest absent-model state on a fresh profile (download-required). The Slovenian transcript that appears is produced by the on-device ORT-Web CTC run (log-probs [1,363,34] observed in the verify harness).
rubric.notes: No pre-baked result anywhere; the Wild page shows honest out-of-language breakdown (Slovenian-phonetic approximation) on English input rather than hiding it.

rubric.evidence: conformance: images-have-alt (canvas waveform + strip carry aria-label/role=img; no bare content ), buttons-have-names. Status uses role=status aria-live=polite; transcript/collapsed use aria-live=polite; Slovenian regions marked lang="sl"; per-word replay buttons have descriptive labels.
rubric.notes: Strong baseline. A full screen-reader pass over the transcript and the per-frame grid would further validate.

rubric.evidence: responsive-check: desktop + mobile clean. scrollWidth-innerWidth = 0 at 1280x800 AND 360x740 (DPR3, touch). audio-row uses flex-wrap+gap; glance/readout wrap; <audio> and canvas set max-inline-size:100%; ctc-strip scrolls internally (max-block-size + overflow-y); transcript uses overflow-wrap:anywhere; the API <pre> code block scrolls. Shared design system: warm paper / indigo, Georgia display; light+dark both on-brand.
rubric.notes: Support set ok/ok on the responsive-check both-classes-clean signal + the verified end-to-end WASM run. NOTE recorded honestly: the ~360 MB fp32 weights are a heavy one-off download/allocation on constrained mobile devices (no smaller export exists); layout + WASM run path are device-class-independent and degrade honestly on fetch/alloc failure.

rubric.evidence: All inference (CTC forward pass + decode) runs in a Web Worker (worker.js) so the ~95M-param model never blocks the main thread; the audio buffer is transferred (not cloned) to the worker; the ~360 MB weight fetch also happens in the worker. Verify run stayed responsive with a clean console; 2.66 s CTC forward pass for 7.28 s audio on the WASM EP.
rubric.notes: An explicit INP measurement during transcription would confirm; the off-thread transfer + off-thread download are the key mitigations.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow, wide content scrolls internally
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Reach for intrinsic sizing and flexible tracks before fixed width/height; use logical properties (inline-size/block-size/max-inline-size); use flex-wrap+gap so items reflow; keep wide content scrolling inside its own container to avoid page-level horizontal overflow.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied -- audio-row/sample-row/readout use flex-wrap+gap; <audio> and the waveform canvas set max-inline-size:100%; the CTC strip scrolls inside its own overflow-y container; transcript uses overflow-wrap:anywhere; the API <pre> code block scrolls. Verified desktopOverflow=0 and mobileOverflow=0 at 360x740 and 1280x800.

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible loading progress and error status live region async loading
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce async state changes in an accessible live region; surface errors on the page next to the action, not only in the console; give every control an accessible name; mark language for correct script shaping.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied -- role=status aria-live=polite loader/status regions; transcript + collapsed use aria-live=polite; load/decode/inference failures set a readable .err status; the loader exposes Retry on failure; Slovenian content carries lang=sl. Verify run: 0 console errors.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance live-status-region + errors-on-the-page + buttons-have-names; verify consoleErrors=0

guidanceConsulted.query: run inference off main thread web worker keep INP low
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Run heavy/CPU-bound work off the main thread so it doesn't spike INP; break up long synchronous work.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied -- the ORT-Web session creation, CTC forward pass, decode, AND the ~360 MB weight download all run in models/slovenian-voxpopuli-asr/worker.js; the 16 kHz audio buffer is transferred to the worker. The main thread only draws the waveform and renders the returned strip.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance inference-off-main-thread=pass; verify run stayed responsive; console clean

guidanceConsulted.query: core web vitals INP responsiveness during heavy on-device inference
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Optimize interaction responsiveness (INP): keep the main thread free during heavy work, transfer large buffers instead of cloning, and avoid unbounded per-sample main-thread loops.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied -- inference is fully off-thread; the audio buffer is transferred (not cloned); the waveform draw is a bounded per-pixel min/max reduction over a ~600px canvas (not per-sample), redrawn only on load/resize.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: worker transfer([copy.buffer]); bounded canvas reduction in drawWaveform

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue<->page navigation.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied (inherited) -- @view-transition navigation:auto in public/styles.css (shared shell); all pages link the shared stylesheet and crumb back to the catalogue/model page.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: shared design system; crumbs on every page

openQuestions: The live ~360 MB fp32 HF download was not exercised in-harness (it exceeds the budget); the full model+decode path was proven against a byte-identical local mirror of the exact HF bytes in real headless Chrome (sha256 = git-LFS oid). A one-off live-HF Download-button drive on a fast connection would close this.
Keyboard-only traversal across all 5 pages: is every control reachable in a sensible focus order with a visible focus ring, and do the per-word replay buttons announce and operate correctly?
Drive the partial/evicted cache and offline-cached states explicitly (delete one cached file -> expect Re-download; go offline with a warm cache -> expect it to still run).

The Slovenian multi-model uses the multilingual opus-mt-mul-en (no dedicated sl-en ONNX exists); its Slovenian->English quality is approximate. If a dedicated Slovenian OPUS-MT ONNX ever ships, swap it in-place for a higher-quality translation.

followUpGoals.goal: If a genuine quantised (q8/q4) Slovenian VoxPopuli ONNX ever ships (the current export has none because onnxruntime's quantizer can't process the dynamo graph), add it as a smaller-download variant of this page (in-place dtype option), keeping the fp32 path.
If a genuine wav2vec2-XLSR-53 Slovenian ONNX with a real CTC head ever ships, add it as a NEW slug (a larger, higher-accuracy variant) -- do not repurpose this wav2vec2-base VoxPopuli page.

summary: slovenian-voxpopuli-asr is a genuinely-distinct, honest demo: the first SLOVENIAN ASR in the showcase -- wav2vec2-base-10k-voxpopuli fine-tuned on Slovenian, a ~95M-param CTC recogniser over the 34-symbol Latin-Slovenian vocab (incl. č š ž). Like the czech/slovak demos it runs on ONNX Runtime Web DIRECTLY (not transformers.js), because the only browser ONNX export (OpenVoiceOS) is an onnx-asr graph whose model_type 'wav2vec2-ctc' transformers.js can't load -- disclosed plainly in a dedicated 'Runtime' at-a-glance row. Verified runnable in real headless Chrome (ORT Web 1.20.1, WASM EP, Web Worker path) against a byte-identical local mirror of the HF files (sha256 = git-LFS oid): the genuine worker path produced REAL log-probs [1,363,34] and a coherent Slovenian transcript on a CC0 VoxPopuli sample ('zelo slabo je da doslej nismo realizirali niti enega od načrtovanjih dvanajstih pilotnih projektov'; 363 frames); 0 console errors. Only an fp32 export exists (~360 MB, disclosed). Not XLSR-53 and not a relabel: the larger wav2vec2-XLSR-53 Slovenian checkpoint (anton-l) is PyTorch/Flax-only. Multi-model chains to OPUS-MT mul->en (no dedicated sl-en ONNX; multilingual model, approximate). Responsive-check desktop+mobile clean. Revision 1.
